nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Sotheworth was born in 1230, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Southworth, was 41 and his mother, Mary de Southworth, was 20. He had at least 2 sons with Emma de Sefton. He died about 1300, at the age of 71, and was buried in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Sotheworth(이)가 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Southworth(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Southworth(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Emma de Sefton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에 묻혔다.
